name: fpga-design-flow
description: FPGA circuit-design skills for Xilinx/AMD Vivado+Vitis: project init, RTL+iverilog verification, full synthesis-to-board workflow, and a growing toolchain-pitfalls knowledge base.

interface.shortDescription: Vivado+Vitis FPGA project init, RTL+iverilog verification, synthesis-to-board workflow, and a pitfalls knowledge base
interface.longDescription: Guides FPGA development on Xilinx/AMD Vivado+Vitis: scaffolds the project agent-instructions file and a result-record template, enforces an RTL -> iverilog -> synthesis -> board-verify flow with mandatory gates, and looks up fixes from a categorized toolchain-pitfalls knowledge base that grows via PRs.
defaultPrompt: I'm starting a new Vivado FPGA project.
Help me add an RTL module and verify it.
